book: UML Diagramming A Case Study Approach
author: Suriya Sundaramoorthy
requirement_paraphrase:
E-Retail is an online marketplace application designed to support small-scale and medium-scale sellers in reaching customers directly. Many sellers face difficulties in marketing and selling their products in a competitive market, which increases operational costs and reduces profit. The E-Retail platform provides a digital marketplace where sellers can list, showcase, advertise, and sell their products without maintaining a physical store.

The system aims to reduce costs such as rent and maintenance while enabling sellers to offer products at competitive prices. It also promotes direct communication between sellers and customers to build a trusted relationship.

System Functionalities
1. Seller Authentication and Registration

New sellers can authenticate and sign up on the portal. Once registered, sellers can list and manage their products on the platform.

2. Separate Login for Sellers and Customers

The application provides separate login access for sellers and customers. Both sellers and customers can sign in and begin using the system according to their roles.

3. Product Listing and Viewing

Sellers can list, showcase, and advertise their products. Customers can view all available products from different sellers.

4. Product Purchase and Online Payment

Customers can buy products through the platform. The system facilitates online payment for purchasing products.

5. Rating and Review

Customers can rate and provide reviews for both the product and the seller after purchase.

6. Reporting Sellers

Customers can report a seller in case of violations in delivery or if the product does not meet the specified requirements.

7. Seller Information Access

Before purchasing a product, customers can view the seller’s contact information and rating.

book: UML Diagramming A Case Study Approach
author: Suriya Sundaramoorthy
requirement_raw:
This case study focuses on using web scrapping for product comparison across websites to reduce
the amount of time and effort involved in finding and comparing the products. To assist and
enable online shopaholics to buy products with ease (Figures 10.1–10.8).
1. Register
Description: Allows the user to register/login to use the system.
Flow of Events
Basic Flow: Allows into the system.
Alternative Flow: Retry to login.
Pre-Conditions: Nil.
Post-Conditions: Control goes to the search product page.
Search Product
Description: Allows the user to search for the product of their choices such as medicines,
clothes and machinery.
Flow of Events
Basic Flow: Displays the search result for the product.
Alternative Flow: Nil.
Pre-Conditions: Users must have logged in.
Post-Conditions: Nil.
3. Search Filter
Description: This allows the user to specify the website on which their product has to be
searched. Example: Search in Amazon.
Flow of Events
Basic Flow: Shows more desired and user-specific results.
Alternative Flow: Nil.
Pre-Conditions: Search product.
Post-Conditions: Nil.
Product Filter
Description: Filter the product results based on user’s choice like rating, rev
iews, and
nomber of purchases.
Flow of Events
Basic Flow: Shows more desired and user-specific results.
Alternative Flow: Nil.
Pre-Conditions: Search product.
Post-Conditions: Nil.
5. Get Product
Description: Redirects the user to the user-selected product’s website. Then, the user can
purchase the product.
Flow of Events
Basic Flow: Enables the user to purchase the product.
Alternative Flow: Nil.
Pre-Conditions: Search product.
Post-Conditions: Nil.
requirement_paraphrase:
Product Recommendation System

This case study focuses on using web scraping to compare products across websites, reducing the time and effort involved in finding and comparing products. The system is designed to assist online shoppers by providing an easier way to buy products.

System Functionalities

Registration and Login
The system allows users to register or log in in order to access the system's functionalities.

Product Search
After logging in, the user can search for products in various categories such as medicines, clothes, and machinery.

Search Filter
The system allows the user to specify which website they want to search for the product on, for example, Amazon.

Product Filter
The system lets users filter the product results based on preferences such as rating, reviews, and number of purchases.

Product Purchase
Once the user selects a product, they are redirected to the product's website where they can make the purchase.

book: UML Diagramming A Case Study Approach
author: Suriya Sundaramoorthy
requirement_raw:
The need for law and enforcement in a country with a high population like India is salient. Lawyers
play a major role in maintaining most of their data as hard copies. This project is mainly designed for
lawyers to make their work more easy and efficient. It is a responsive web application that would pro-
vide lawyers with various services that would help them to maintain their documents. The services
include a logbook that has details about the cases along with a calendar. The lawyers can also upload
and save documents related to their case. It contains formats of model forms and links to online fil-
ing. It also provides quick references of common cases and detailed information about laws through
e-books. Information about the judicial exams for lawyers is also made available. Furthermore, the
web application contains news updates for lawyers, blogs and feedback. This case study will serve as
a small hand tool for lawyers to maintain the soft copies of their data (Figures 11.1–11.8).
requirement_paraphrase:
This project is designed to support lawyers in managing their work more efficiently. In countries with large populations, the need for law and enforcement is significant, and lawyers often maintain their case records as hard copies. This web application provides a digital platform to help lawyers manage and organize their professional data in soft copy format.

The system is a responsive web application that offers various services to assist lawyers in maintaining their documents and case-related information.

System Functionalities
1. Case Logbook and Calendar

The application provides a logbook that contains details of cases handled by the lawyer. It also includes a calendar to manage case schedules and related events.

2. Document Upload and Storage

Lawyers can upload and store documents related to their cases within the system.

3. Model Forms and Online Filing

The system provides formats of model forms and includes links to online filing services.

4. Legal References

The application offers quick references for common cases and detailed legal information through e-books.

5. Judicial Examination Information

Information related to judicial examinations for lawyers is made available within the application.

6. News, Blogs, and Feedback

The system includes news updates, blogs, and a feedback feature for users.

book: UML Diagramming A Case Study Approach
author: Suriya Sundaramoorthy
requirement_raw:
This case study is helpful to people who forget their mobile phones at home as a part of their
busy daily routines. Keeping tick of essentials in this fast-paced life sometimes turns out to be
quite demanding. People sometimes forget their phones at home. What if we need to make an
important call and we don’t remember the contact number? Sometimes our phones just get disap-
peared and the scariest part is when the phone is put on silent mode. We sometimes want to lock
our phones when they aren’t around us. Need to know the exact location of your phone? Therein
comes the use of ‘My Helper’. The solutions to all the problems stated above can be solved easily
and very quickly if u have the application ‘My Helper’ pre-installed on your phone and u have
completed configuring the app. All you need to do is just send an SMS to your mobile number
from any phone that you have access to…and there goes your problem solved. The scope of this
system is increasing every day across the entire world where everything is happening at the speed
of a Formula 1 Car on a race track. The objective of this system is to provide help to people facing
these types of problems instantly with the help of advanced technology. The alluring features of
this system are Remote Access without the Internet, Track your phone through an SMS, Hassle-
Free as no OTP and ID PASSWORD is required and an SMS can help you change the sound
profile of your phone (silent to normal) without Internet. The system is user friendly and the appli-
cation will be available to even basic smartphones (Figures 12.1–12.8).
requirement_paraphrase:
My Helper is a mobile application intended to help people in situations where they 
forget their phone at home, lose their phone, keep it on silent, or need to lock/locate
it when it is not nearby. If the application is pre-installed and configured, the user 
can send an SMS to their own phone number from any accessible phone to trigger the required 
help action. The system focuses on providing instant support using SMS-based remote access
without requiring internet connectivity. Key features include remote access without internet,
tracking the phone through SMS, operating without OTP/ID-password, and changing the phone’s 
sound profile (silent to normal) via SMS. The application is intended to be user-friendly 
and usable even on basic smartphones.

book: UML Diagramming A Case Study Approach
author: Suriya Sundaramoorthy
requirement_raw:
The all in one COVID-19 management system simplifies the entire process of decreasing the
virus load in the community by digitalization. It includes tracking and treating COVID-19
patients and monitoring the spread of the virus. It aims to assist healthcare organizations and
governments to assess patient risk profiles and provide awareness to common people by connect-
ing them with virtual care capabilities. With the current epidemiological situation of COVID-19,
there is a high demand to reduce contact between persons and digitize the whole process. This
will effectively reduce the infection rate, help the common people and empower medical profes-
sionals across the world to help more patients through telemedicine and virtual care.
Functionalities:
temperature, symptoms, medicine intake and diet of the registered patient. All the infor-
mation of the patients from screening to discharge can be viewed. Medicines can also be
prescribed to a specific patient.
2. COVID-19 Patients: View the data shared by the doctor, home quarantined patients can
update data and checklist of medical shops in their locality.
3. Common People: Check the number of people infected (symptomatic and asymptomatic)
and death in their locality ranging from current street, 500 m, 1 km, 5 km, 10 km and view
a blog where recovered persons share their experience.
4. COVID-19 Essentials Seller: Can stock up essentials like masks and gloves according to
infection in an area. Medical shops nearby the area will be listed.
5. Corporation Worker Head:  workers will be assigned to disinfect covid affected areas  regularly based on infection data and update status.
6. Admin: updates current number of infected people in a locality.
requirement_paraphrase:
The all-in-one COVID-19 management system digitizes the process of reducing virus load in the community. It supports tracking and treating COVID-19 patients and monitoring the spread of the virus. The system aims to help healthcare organizations and governments assess patient risk profiles and provide awareness to common people by connecting them with virtual care capabilities. Because reducing contact between people is important in the current epidemiological situation, the system digitizes major activities to reduce infection rate, support common people, and enable medical professionals to help more patients through telemedicine and virtual care.

Functionalities:

Registered Patient: Patient health information (such as temperature, symptoms, medicine intake, and diet) can be updated. Patient information from screening to discharge can be viewed, and medicines can be prescribed to a specific patient.

COVID-19 Patients: Patients can view data shared by the doctor. Home-quarantined patients can update data and use a checklist of medical shops in their locality.

Common People: People can check the number of infected persons (symptomatic and asymptomatic) and deaths in their locality (current street, 500 m, 1 km, 5 km, 10 km). They can also view blogs where recovered persons share their experience.

COVID-19 Essentials Seller: Sellers can stock essentials such as masks and gloves according to infection in an area, and nearby medical shops will be listed.

Corporation Worker Head: Workers can be assigned to disinfect COVID-affected areas regularly based on infection data and update status.

Admin: The admin updates the current number of infected people in a locality.
